response.justification: Bogdan's resume demonstrates strong software engineering skills across multiple domains, but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload performance analysis. His background is heavily focused on web/mobile development, embedded systems tools, and general software architecture, with no mention of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or AI workload optimization. While he has a strong education (ETH Zürich CS degree), his 12+ years of experience don't align with the required hardware-focused AI accelerator domain expertise.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with diverse tech stack experience
Proven ability to design and maintain complex systems (e.g., GISCollective platform)
Experience with low-latency applications and performance optimization in backend systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or hardware-software co-design
Lacks background in AI accelerator architecture or deep-learning workload optimization
No evidence of work with SIMD/MIMD architectures or GPU performance analysis
